title: Double click
drDigitalIntro:
A double click is two quick clicks in a row with one finger.
• It's how you open files and folders.
• Try it below: double-click GroceryList.txt and Budget.xlsx to open them.
drDigitalSuccess: Perfect double-clicking! You opened exactly the right files.
drDigitalHint: Click twice quickly, right on top of the file name — that's a double click. Try it on GroceryList.txt and Budget.xlsx.
